# Yuumpy

> Yuumpy is an online marketplace connecting buyers with verified, independent
> sellers in the United Kingdom. Every purchase is protected by escrow payments
> and the Yuumpy Buyer Guarantee — funds are held securely until the buyer
> confirms the order arrived as described.

## Key facts

- Marketplace model: independent sellers list and fulfil their own products;
  Yuumpy provides escrow payment protection, buyer/seller verification, and
  dispute resolution.
- Currency: GBP (£). Primary market: United Kingdom.
- Buyer protection: the Yuumpy Buyer Guarantee covers items not received, not
  as described, damaged in transit, or counterfeit.
- Sellers are verified before their storefront and products go live.

## Key pages

- [All Products](https://yuumpy.com/products): browse the full product catalogue.
- [Categories](https://yuumpy.com/products/categories): browse by product category.
- [Sell on Yuumpy](https://yuumpy.com/sell-on-yuumpy): how to become a verified seller.
- [Buyer Guarantee](https://yuumpy.com/support/buyer-guarantee): what buyer protection covers.
- [Escrow Policy](https://yuumpy.com/support/escrow-policy): how escrow payments work.
- [Seller Verification](https://yuumpy.com/support/seller-verification): how sellers are vetted.
- [Dispute Resolution](https://yuumpy.com/support/dispute-resolution): how order disputes are handled.
- [About Yuumpy](https://yuumpy.com/about): company overview.

## Sitemap

Full, up-to-date list of pages: https://yuumpy.com/sitemap.xml
